original_image_tags: A purple stamped date at bottom left.

elements.description: Typed United States Government Office Memorandum form (Standard Form No. 64). The page contains structured typed text including header fields, a subject line, body paragraphs, and administrative notations. There are various handwritten annotations in red and blue ink, as well as several stamps (e.g., 'JUL 26 1954', 'EX-127', 'AUG 4 1954 COPIES DESTROYED', 'NOV 19 1954').

judge.reason: Description B adds several specific stamps with dates that are absent from Description A, but they do not contradict each other on the single stamp mentioned by A.
